meta.name: Pokemon Champions Item Data
notes: This does not include every PokéAPI item.
Mega Stones can be added later as a separate category.
sources: Pokemon Database Champions item list discussion

black-belt.name: Black Belt
black-belt.description: Boosts the power of Fighting-type moves.
black-belt.flavorText: A belt that helps the wearer focus and strengthens Fighting-type moves.

black-glasses.name: Black Glasses
black-glasses.description: Boosts the power of Dark-type moves.
black-glasses.flavorText: A pair of shady-looking glasses that strengthens Dark-type moves.

bright-powder.name: Bright Powder
bright-powder.description: Lowers the accuracy of moves targeting the holder.
bright-powder.flavorText: A tricky powder that makes the holder harder to hit.

charcoal.name: Charcoal
charcoal.description: Boosts the power of Fire-type moves.
charcoal.flavorText: A combustible fuel that strengthens Fire-type moves.

choice-scarf.name: Choice Scarf
choice-scarf.description: Boosts Speed, but the holder can only use the first move it selects.
choice-scarf.flavorText: A curious scarf that boosts Speed but locks the holder into one move.

chople-berry.name: Chople Berry
chople-berry.description: Weakens one super-effective Fighting-type attack against the holder.
chople-berry.flavorText: A Berry that lessens damage from one super-effective Fighting-type attack.

dragon-fang.name: Dragon Fang
dragon-fang.description: Boosts the power of Dragon-type moves.
dragon-fang.flavorText: A hard, sharp fang that strengthens Dragon-type moves.

fairy-feather.name: Fairy Feather
fairy-feather.description: Boosts the power of Fairy-type moves.
fairy-feather.flavorText: A feather that strengthens Fairy-type moves.

focus-band.name: Focus Band
focus-band.description: May allow the holder to survive an attack that would knock it out.
focus-band.flavorText: A headband that may let the holder endure a potential knockout.

focus-sash.name: Focus Sash
focus-sash.description: If the holder has full HP and would be knocked out, it survives with 1 HP. The item is consumed.
focus-sash.flavorText: Lets a full-HP holder endure a potential knockout with 1 HP.

hard-stone.name: Hard Stone
hard-stone.description: Boosts the power of Rock-type moves.
hard-stone.flavorText: A durable stone that strengthens Rock-type moves.

icy-rock.name: Icy Rock
icy-rock.description: Extends snow caused by the holder.
icy-rock.flavorText: When the holder changes the weather to snow, snow lasts longer.

iron-ball.name: Iron Ball
iron-ball.description: Lowers the holder's Speed and makes Flying or levitating holders vulnerable to Ground-type moves.
iron-ball.flavorText: A heavy ball that slows the holder and grounds it.

kasib-berry.name: Kasib Berry
kasib-berry.description: Weakens one super-effective Ghost-type attack against the holder.
kasib-berry.flavorText: A Berry that lessens damage from one super-effective Ghost-type attack.

kebia-berry.name: Kebia Berry
kebia-berry.description: Weakens one super-effective Poison-type attack against the holder.
kebia-berry.flavorText: A Berry that lessens damage from one super-effective Poison-type attack.

kings-rock.name: King's Rock
kings-rock.description: Damaging moves may cause the target to flinch.
kings-rock.flavorText: When the holder deals damage, the target may also flinch.

leftovers.name: Leftovers
leftovers.description: Restores a small amount of HP every turn.
leftovers.flavorText: The holder's HP is slowly but steadily restored throughout battle.

leppa-berry.name: Leppa Berry
leppa-berry.description: Restores 10 PP to a depleted move.
leppa-berry.flavorText: A Berry that restores PP to one depleted move.

life-orb.name: Life Orb
life-orb.description: Boosts the power of damaging moves, but the holder loses HP after landing an attack.
life-orb.flavorText: Boosts move power, but the holder loses HP upon landing an attack.

light-ball.name: Light Ball
light-ball.description: If held by Pikachu, boosts Attack and Special Attack.
light-ball.flavorText: A puzzling orb that boosts Pikachu's Attack and Sp. Atk.

light-clay.name: Light Clay
light-clay.description: Extends the duration of protective screen effects such as Reflect and Light Screen.

magnet.name: Magnet
magnet.description: Boosts the power of Electric-type moves.
magnet.flavorText: A powerful magnet that strengthens Electric-type moves.

mental-herb.name: Mental Herb
mental-herb.description: Removes move-binding effects from the holder. Can be used only once.
mental-herb.flavorText: Lets the holder shake off move-binding effects once.

metal-coat.name: Metal Coat
metal-coat.description: Boosts the power of Steel-type moves.
metal-coat.flavorText: A special metallic film that strengthens Steel-type moves.

metronome.name: Metronome
metronome.description: Boosts the power of a move used repeatedly. The boost resets when a different move is used.
metronome.flavorText: Boosts a move that is used repeatedly.

miracle-seed.name: Miracle Seed
miracle-seed.description: Boosts the power of Grass-type moves.
miracle-seed.flavorText: A seed imbued with life-force that strengthens Grass-type moves.

muscle-band.name: Muscle Band
muscle-band.description: Slightly boosts the power of physical moves.
muscle-band.flavorText: A headband that slightly strengthens physical moves.

mystic-water.name: Mystic Water
mystic-water.description: Boosts the power of Water-type moves.
mystic-water.flavorText: A teardrop-shaped gem that strengthens Water-type moves.

never-melt-ice.name: Never-Melt Ice
never-melt-ice.description: Boosts the power of Ice-type moves.
never-melt-ice.flavorText: A heat-repelling piece of ice that strengthens Ice-type moves.

poison-barb.name: Poison Barb
poison-barb.description: Boosts the power of Poison-type moves.
poison-barb.flavorText: A small poisonous barb that strengthens Poison-type moves.

quick-claw.name: Quick Claw
quick-claw.description: May allow the holder to move first.
quick-claw.flavorText: A light, sharp claw that may let the holder move first.

scope-lens.name: Scope Lens
scope-lens.flavorText: A lens that helps the holder land critical hits.

sharp-beak.name: Sharp Beak
sharp-beak.description: Boosts the power of Flying-type moves.
sharp-beak.flavorText: A long, sharp beak that strengthens Flying-type moves.

sitrus-berry.name: Sitrus Berry
sitrus-berry.description: Restores HP when the holder's HP gets low.
sitrus-berry.flavorText: A Berry that restores the holder's HP when health gets low.
